text:
Raoul Mountain (ラウル山, Rauru-san) is a mountain across the Milsy Wetlands and where the Big Horn Bear nests. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 10 (1999) 

Overview

The Raoul Mountain is the main location where the Gourmet Hunter Menchi goes to hunt a Big Horn Bear for the moss that grows on the animal. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

To prove the value and endeavors of being a Gourmet Hunter, Menchi ventures to the Raoul Mountain and hunts a Big Horn Bear for its moss.
